task_completion.description: Agent navigates to the Daily Absence Report section in the OpenSIS web interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the OpenSIS application open in a browser with the 'Absence Report' or 'Attendance' module visible.

task_completion.description: Agent configures the report to be generated for today's date.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The date selection field in the report generation form is set to the current date, or the generated report header displays the current date.

task_completion.description: The generated report correctly includes the students marked as absent.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The names 'Cameron Frye' and 'Ferris Bueller' are clearly visible in the generated report or the print preview screen.

task_completion.description: The generated report correctly excludes students marked as present.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The name 'Hermione Granger' is NOT visible in the generated report or the print preview screen.

task_completion.description: The report is saved as a PDF file named 'absence_report.pdf' in the Documents directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager window, browser download notification, or 'Save As' dialog shows a file named 'absence_report.pdf' located in or being saved to the '/home/ga/Documents' folder.

integrity.description: Agent used the OpenSIS web interface to generate the report.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the OpenSIS web application in a browser, rather than direct database queries or terminal scripts.

integrity.description: The PDF was generated via the application's export/print functionality.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the browser's print dialog (Save to PDF) or an OpenSIS export button being used, rather than a text editor or word processor being manually filled out.

integrity.description: Agent did not use terminal commands to create a fake file.
integrity.visual_evidence: Terminal windows should not show commands like 'touch /home/ga/Documents/absence_report.pdf' or 'echo ... > absence_report.pdf' to bypass the actual report generation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires generating a Daily Absence Report in OpenSIS. The absent students that MUST be in the report are 'Cameron Frye' and 'Ferris Bueller'. The present student that MUST NOT be in the report is 'Hermione Granger'. The final file must be a PDF saved exactly at '/home/ga/Documents/absence_report.pdf'.
